forbidden_checks: No patch may disable authenticateJWT middleware
No patch may set RLS to false on any Supabase table
No patch may expose process.env to client-side code
No patch may use eval() or new Function() with user input

DS-001.title: Sanitise /api/terminal/exec shell execution
DS-001.description: Wrap exec() with an allowlist of permitted commands. Reject shell metacharacters (; | && || > <). Return 403 with structured error if command is blocked.

DS-002.title: Upgrade Supabase client to Service Role Key
DS-002.description: Replace SUPABASE_ANON_KEY with SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY for all server-to-Supabase calls. Add runtime assertion if key is missing.

DS-003.title: Add rate limiting to evolution trigger endpoint
DS-003.description: Install and apply express-rate-limit (5 req/15 min) to POST /api/evolution/trigger to prevent abuse.

CG-001.title: Evolution Engine Dashboard Widget
CG-001.description: Create EvolutionMonitor.tsx component. Live-polls GET /api/evolution/status every 10s. Shows engine state, cycle count, last evolution timestamp, telemetry sparkline. Dark glassmorphism card with animated pulse dot.

CG-002.title: Convert WebsiteOverview to live data
CG-002.description: Replace hardcoded static data array with async fetch from GET /api/sites using JWT from localStorage. Add loading skeleton and empty state.

CG-003.title: Agent Activity Feed Component
CG-003.description: Create AgentActivityFeed.tsx. Reads from GET /api/evolution/history. Shows last 10 evolution events in timeline. Color-coded: CRITICAL=red, HIGH=amber, MEDIUM=blue, LOW=green.

LM-001.title: Create .env.example
LM-001.description: Create .env.example at project root documenting ALL required variables: PORT, JWT_SECRET, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, EVOLUTION_MODE.
LM-001.validation: Test that all variables referenced in avon-backend/server.js are documented

LM-002.title: Mission Manifest Upgrade to v2.0.0
LM-002.description: Bump version to 2.0.0. Add velocity_directive_id, swarm_assignments, last_blueprint_timestamp fields. Update boot_timestamp.

LM-003.title: Evolution Log Archiver Script
LM-003.description: Create scripts/archiveEvolutionLog.js. If memory/evolution_log.jsonl > 1MB, rotate to dated backup. Print summary of total entries, cycles, most common patch target.
